name: Pizza Thot | Your First Day
description:
Pizza Thot, where the customer satisfaction is guaranteed, in more ways than one.

Today is your first day on the job. You were hired to do either cooking or delivery at a themed restaurant that revolves around good fucking pizza and… good fucking?

Learn the ropes from Boss or Tips and maybe see if you have what it takes to make it in the sex themed pizza business.

Wanted to do another take at the Pizza Thot bot, this time wanted to try a perspective being at the restaurant and optionally be the one to get your ‘tips’. Initial testing went kind of wild and silly so let me know if you like it or not as usual!

Warnings: “technical” prostitution if you think too hard on it, otherwise nothing specific besides maybe size differences for the two girls.

Credits: Characters of Pizza Thot by Gats, main art by ssssonic2, and could not see artist for one I put in opening message.

Bonus image is inside the bot this time!
creator: Samuelz
